title: Additional One-Word Prepositions
description: Practice additional one-word prepositions used for position, comparison, movement, inclusion, exclusion, and rates.

questions.completedSentence: Unlike Ken, Aya arrived early.
questions.japanese: ケンと違って、アヤは早く着いた。

questions.completedSentence: Tickets cost ¥1,000 per person.
questions.japanese: チケットは一人につき1,000円である。

questions.completedSentence: The cat slept beneath the table.
questions.japanese: 猫はテーブルの下で眠った。

questions.completedSentence: Ten students joined, including Aya.
questions.japanese: アヤを含めて10人の学生が参加した。

questions.completedSentence: This bag is heavier than mine.
questions.japanese: このかばんは私のものより重い。

questions.completedSentence: She looked out the window.
questions.japanese: 彼女は窓の外を見た。

questions.completedSentence: The bank is opposite the station.
questions.japanese: 銀行は駅の向かいにある。

questions.completedSentence: Upon arrival, show your ID.
questions.japanese: 到着したら身分証を提示すること。

questions.completedSentence: We walked round the lake.
questions.japanese: 湖の周りを歩いた。

questions.completedSentence: The price is ¥5,000, excluding tax.
questions.japanese: 価格は税を除いて5,000円である。

questions.completedSentence: A river flows beneath the bridge.
questions.japanese: 川は橋の下を流れている。

questions.completedSentence: We have three classes per week.
questions.japanese: 週に3回授業がある。

questions.completedSentence: This book is unlike the others.
questions.japanese: この本は他の本とは異なる。

questions.completedSentence: Payment is due upon delivery.
questions.japanese: 支払いは配達時に必要である。

questions.completedSentence: They sat round the table.
questions.japanese: 彼らはテーブルを囲んで座った。

questions.completedSentence: Sit opposite me.
questions.japanese: 私の向かいに座ってほしい。

questions.completedSentence: The fee is ¥3,000, including tax.
questions.japanese: 料金は税込みで3,000円である。

questions.completedSentence: He ran out the door.
questions.japanese: 彼はドアから外へ走り出た。

questions.completedSentence: Ken is taller than me.
questions.japanese: ケンは私より背が高い。

questions.completedSentence: A fence runs round the garden.
questions.japanese: 庭の周りに柵がある。

questions.completedSentence: The course lasts 14 weeks, excluding holidays.
questions.japanese: その授業は休暇を除いて14週間続く。

questions.completedSentence: The letter was beneath the books.
questions.japanese: 手紙は本の下にあった。

questions.sentence: ___ hearing the news, she called me.
questions.completedSentence: Upon hearing the news, she called me.
questions.japanese: その知らせを聞くと、彼女は私に電話した。

questions.completedSentence: Unlike yesterday, today is sunny.
questions.japanese: 昨日と違って、今日は晴れている。

questions.sentence: The limit is two books ___ student.
questions.completedSentence: The limit is two books per student.
questions.japanese: 一人の学生につき2冊までである。

questions.completedSentence: We visited three cities, including Kyoto.
questions.japanese: 京都を含む3都市を訪れた。

questions.completedSentence: The ball flew out the window.
questions.japanese: ボールが窓から外へ飛び出した。

questions.completedSentence: More than 20 students came.
questions.japanese: 20人を超える学生が来た。

questions.completedSentence: Their house is opposite the park.
questions.japanese: 彼らの家は公園の向かいにある。

questions.completedSentence: The total is ¥8,000, excluding shipping.
questions.japanese: 合計は送料を除いて8,000円である。

questions.sentence: ___ entering the room, he sat down.
questions.completedSentence: Upon entering the room, he sat down.
questions.japanese: 部屋に入ると、彼は座った。

questions.completedSentence: The village lies beneath the mountain.
questions.japanese: 村は山の下にある。

questions.completedSentence: The room costs ¥8,000 per night.
questions.japanese: その部屋は一泊につき8,000円である。

questions.completedSentence: His answer was unlike mine.
questions.japanese: 彼の答えは私のものとは異なっていた。

questions.completedSentence: Everyone, including the teacher, laughed.
questions.japanese: 先生を含めて全員が笑った。

questions.completedSentence: The pharmacy is opposite the hospital.
questions.japanese: 薬局は病院の向かいにある。

questions.completedSentence: The road bends round the hill.
questions.japanese: 道は丘の周りを曲がっている。

questions.completedSentence: She arrived earlier than us.
questions.japanese: 彼女は私たちより早く着いた。

questions.completedSentence: Twelve people came, excluding the guides.
questions.japanese: ガイドを除いて12人が来た。

questions.completedSentence: The cat jumped out the window.
questions.japanese: 猫が窓から外へ飛び出した。

questions.completedSentence: Students get one point per answer.
questions.japanese: 一つの解答につき1点が与えられる。

questions.completedSentence: The form is available upon request.
questions.japanese: その用紙は希望すれば入手できる。

questions.sentence: She tied a scarf ___ her neck.
questions.completedSentence: She tied a scarf round her neck.
questions.japanese: 彼女は首にスカーフを巻いた。

questions.sentence: The package contains five items, ___ batteries.
questions.completedSentence: The package contains five items, including batteries.
questions.japanese: 電池を含めて、その商品には5点入っている。

questions.completedSentence: Sand moved beneath my feet.
questions.japanese: 足元で砂が動いた。

questions.completedSentence: We walked out the gate.
questions.japanese: 門から外へ歩いて出た。

questions.completedSentence: He stood opposite the door.
questions.japanese: 彼はドアの向かいに立っていた。

questions.completedSentence: We meet daily, excluding Sunday.
questions.japanese: 日曜日を除いて毎日会う。

questions.completedSentence: We drove round the city.
questions.japanese: 町の周りを車で走った。

questions.sentence: She wore a sweater ___ her coat.
questions.completedSentence: She wore a sweater beneath her coat.
questions.japanese: 彼女はコートの下にセーターを着ていた。

questions.sentence: The red bag is cheaper ___ the blue one.
questions.completedSentence: The red bag is cheaper than the blue one.
questions.japanese: 赤いかばんは青いものより安い。

questions.completedSentence: The car travels 15 kilometers per liter.
questions.japanese: その車は1リットルにつき15キロ走る。

questions.completedSentence: Upon graduation, she moved to Tokyo.
questions.japanese: 卒業すると、彼女は東京へ引っ越した。

questions.sentence: The class has 25 students, ___ two exchange students.
questions.completedSentence: The class has 25 students, including two exchange students.
questions.japanese: 留学生2人を含めて、そのクラスには25人いる。

questions.completedSentence: Unlike my brother, I enjoy cooking.
questions.japanese: 兄と違って、私は料理が好きである。

questions.completedSentence: Smoke poured out the chimney.
questions.japanese: 煙が煙突から外へ出た。

questions.completedSentence: The café is opposite the library.
questions.japanese: カフェは図書館の向かいにある。

questions.completedSentence: It was colder than yesterday.
questions.japanese: 昨日より寒かった。

questions.completedSentence: The lights turn on upon sunset.
questions.japanese: 日没になると照明がつく。

questions.sentence: The second test was ___ the first.
questions.completedSentence: The second test was unlike the first.
questions.japanese: 2回目の試験は1回目とは異なっていた。
